summary: Iteration 157: Verified refactoring of MillEntryForm and EntryTable components. All functionality preserved - login, Total Summary card (6 metrics), Mill Entries table (23 columns), MillEntryForm dialog (26 fields), auto-calculation (KG→QNTL), 4 sub-tabs, action buttons, and 11 main tabs all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: MillEntryForm.jsx - Properly extracted with all 26 form fields and auto-calculation display
PASS: EntryTable.jsx - Properly extracted with Total Summary card (6 metrics) and Mill Entries table (23 columns)
PASS: App.js imports both components correctly from @/components/entries/
PASS: All props passed correctly (formData, calculatedFields, handlers, suggestions, etc.)
PASS: data-testid attributes preserved for all interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring verified: MillEntryForm.jsx (form dialog) and EntryTable.jsx (totals + table) extracted from App.js. App.js reduced from 2504 to 1909 lines. All functionality preserved: login, 6 Total Summary metrics (QNTL, BAG, Mill W, Final W, G.Issued, Cash Paid), 23 table columns, 26 form fields, auto-calculation (KG/100=QNTL), 4 sub-tabs (Mill Entries, Auto Vehicle Weight, Auto Weight Entries, Paddy Purchase Register), action buttons (Refresh, Filter, Excel, PDF, Excel Import, Nayi Entry), 11 main tabs navigation.

features_tested.total_summary_card: PASS - All 6 metric boxes displayed (Total QNTL, Total BAG, Total Mill W, Total Final W, Total G.Issued, Total Cash Paid)
features_tested.mill_entries_table: PASS - All 23 column headers present (Date, Season, Truck, RST, TP, Agent, Mandi, QNTL, BAG, G.Dep, GBW, P.Pkt, P.Cut, Mill W, M%, M.Cut, C%, D/D/P, Final W, G.Iss, Cash, Diesel, Act)
features_tested.nayi_entry_dialog: PASS - MillEntryForm opens with all 26 fields
features_tested.sub_tabs: PASS - All 4 sub-tabs clickable (Mill Entries, Auto Vehicle Weight, Auto Weight Entries, Paddy Purchase Register)
features_tested.action_buttons: PASS - Refresh, Filter, Excel, PDF buttons found and working
features_tested.main_tab_navigation: PASS - All 11 tabs navigable (Entries, Dashboard, Milling, DC Payments, Vouchers, Cash Book, Payments, Reports, Mill Parts, Staff, FY Summary)
